name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-12
title: No test verifies invariant 3 (never reads registry.json)
description: Spec invariant 3 says the script uses find-feature.py list-json for feature enumeration and never reads registry.json. No test asserts this. Add a test that greps resolve-scope.py and format-feature-context.py for 'registry.json' references and fails if found.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3 PR. BUG-21 hardcoded names removed; BUG-28 defensive .get() for optional keys; BUG-7/9/12/14/17 covered by new test-invariant-coverage.py.
